title: paeonia × suffruticosa var. jishanensis
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa var. jishanensis is a variant of the tree peony, a flowering plant that belongs to the genus Paeonia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, from fever and rheumatism to skin conditions and menstrual disorders. The plant is also valued for its ability to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief and mood enhancement. Paeonia × suffruticosa var. jishanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, or used as a topical cream or ointment, depending on the desired application and dosage.
